role_title: Product Manager, Agent Development Brazilian Portuguese speaking
secondary_archetype: Technical PM with customer-facing / solutions orientation

seniority.level: Senior IC (Senior PM / Staff PM equivalent)
level_signals: 5-7+ years experience in product development of highly technical products
Past experience in Product Management or other similar product development roles at or above the level of Senior Product Manager

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 5-7+ years experience in product development of highly technical products.
Past experience in Product Management or other similar product development roles at or above the level of Senior Product Manager.
must_haves.qualifier: Senior Product Manager level or above

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience crafting and tailoring a message for potential customers, including executives.
Ability to communicate highly technical concepts to both non-technical and technically proficient audiences, including recent AI developments.
Professional fluency in both Brazilian Portuguese and English.
Degree in a technical or related field, or equivalent professional experience.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: AI-related experience (experience with product development for AI agents a plus).
Some coding experience with React, Typescript, and Go.
MBA or equivalent professional experience (while this is a product management role, you will have the opportunity to lean into broader business roles).
Past roles that interface with end customers to influence software development.

scope.surface: Enterprise AI agents handling customer conversations at scale
scope.business_model: B2B SaaS platform — AI agent platform sold to enterprise customers
primary_metrics_inferred: Customer conversation volume handled by AI agents
core_responsibilities: Partner directly with engineers and customers to build and ship AI agents that handle thousands of customer conversations a day
Prepare and present demonstrations of Sierra's agent
Address and overcome technical challenges in the business process by working with technical counterparts
Develop and improve Sierra virtual agents to fit and anticipate customers' needs and business processes
Become trusted advisors and drive strategic technical strategies for customers
Work with Sierra's engineering and product development teams to scope and implement new features essential to the success of customers

compensation.equity_form: Eligible full-time employees can participate in Sierra's equity plans subject to the terms of the applicable plans and policies

green_flags: Clear product surface with real customer impact (thousands of conversations per day)
High-profile co-founders (Bret Taylor, Clay Bavor) with deep AI and enterprise pedigree
Role has direct customer engagement and strategic advisory responsibilities — broad scope for senior PMs
Encourages applications even if experience doesn't precisely match the job description
red_flags: Primarily in-person company based in San Francisco — limited flexibility for remote candidates
Hard bilingual requirement (Brazilian Portuguese + English) significantly narrows candidate pool
No visa sponsorship or work authorization information provided
Role blends PM and solutions/pre-sales duties, which may not suit all PM candidates

ambiguities: The JD lists many global offices (Atlanta, New York, London, Paris, Madrid, Munich, Singapore, Tokyo, Sydney) but does not clarify if this specific role is available in those locations or SF only; treated as SF-onsite based on 'primarily an in-person company based in San Francisco'.
